Package subscriberGui

Class ForgotCodeController

java.lang.Object
subscriberGui.ForgotCodeController
public class ForgotCodeController extends Object
Controller for the ForgotCode screen. Allows the user to request their parking code via email or SMS.

  • Method Details

    • initialize

      public void initialize()
      Initializes the controller, sets actions and fetches latest contact info.

    • handleEmailResponse

      public void handleEmailResponse(bpark_common.ServerResponse response)
      Handles the server response after attempting to send an email.
      Parameters:
      response - the server response indicating success or failure

    • updateEmailDisplay

      public void updateEmailDisplay(String email)
      Updates and masks the email address for display.
      Parameters:
      email - the full email address to be masked

    • updatePhoneDisplay

      public void updatePhoneDisplay(String phone)
      Updates and masks the phone number for display.
      Parameters:
      phone - the full phone number to be masked

    • getActualEmail

      public String getActualEmail()
      Returns the actual email address (unmasked) of the subscriber.
      Returns:
      the full email address

    • getActualPhone

      public String getActualPhone()
      Returns the actual phone number (unmasked) of the subscriber.
      Returns:
      the full phone number
